name: Radiology Imaging Data Containing Faces from The Cancer Imaging Archive
description: Effective January 6, 2022, all radiology datasets containing images that could be used to reconstruct a 3D volume resembling a human face were put behind a controlled-access request system to  mitigate potential re-identification risks emerging from advances in facial recognition tools.
